title: wire/litz
description: The description of a stranded litz magnet wire

oneOf.description: The name of the wire used as strand

outerDiameter.description: The outer diameter of the wire. Unit: m.

numberStrands.description: Number of strands in the litz construction. Equivalent to numberConductors on basicWire; provided here for clarity since litz is the only wire type where the strand count is intrinsic to the geometry.

twistPitch.description: Length of one full twist of the litz bundle along the wire axis. Unit: m. Vendors quote this in mm or as 'lay length'; convert to metres before serialisation. No international standard exists for litz construction; this field captures the most commonly published vendor parameter.
